script_text: Academic words are the fancy words used in school.
Each subject has its own set — science, history, math.
Context clues still work. The words around a big word give hints.
Break the word into prefix, root, suffix.
Photograph has photo (light) + graph (writing). A writing with light!
Keep a little notebook of new words. Write each one with a picture or example.
Now you are ready for academic words!
